_description: Reference: sys-geo-human-agent-toggle (W7.3) — per-tenant SETTING (not a marketplace component, not a block). Adds a top-level `content_settings.geo_toggle_enabled` boolean. When ON, every rendered page exposes a 'human view / agent view' switcher that toggles between the styled HTML and an LLM-friendly Markdown projection of the same content.
_no_marketplace_row: W7.3 ships as a top-level boolean column, NOT a content_components row. There is nothing to insert into a page's blocks[]. Toggle from the dashboard at /dashboard/content/settings or via PATCH /api/v1/dashboard/content/settings.

_dashboard_save_pattern._note: Boolean toggles need a dedicated save handler — the generic falsy-collapse handler at apps/web/src/routes/client/content/settings.tsx ships `false` as `undefined` (the toggle gets stuck ON). Use the dedicated handleSaveAgentNative variant. See catalog/LEARNINGS.md → 'Settings dashboard handleSave collapses boolean false to undefined'.
